synopsis:
Third issue from Marvel Comics Jedi Knights Series
QUI-GON JINN AND OBI-WAN KENOBI BATTLE GIANT MONSTERS!
ALL SPLASH PAGES! ALL ACTION! The most unusual Jedi Knights tale ever told! QUI-GON and OBI-WAN defy death in an epic attempt to save the life of SENATOR BAIL ORGANA on a planet full of skyscraper-sized monsters!
title: Jedi Knights #03
